zh.Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Pilkington於1474年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊克本時，她的父親Sir Charles Pilkington45歲，母親Elizabeth Gateford40歲。她於1490年8月2日與Sir John Towneley在英國藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在英國藍卡爾哈加姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰藍卡爾波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Pilkington于1474年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊克本时，她的父亲Sir Charles Pilkington45岁，母亲Elizabeth Gateford40岁。她于1490年8月2日与Sir John Towneley在英国藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在英国藍卡爾哈加姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Pilkington was born in 1474, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Charles Pilkington, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Gateford, was 40. She married Sir John Towneley on 2 August 1490, in Whalley, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1522, in Habergham, Lancashire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Pilkington est née en 1474, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Charles Pilkington, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gateford, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Towneley le 2 août 1490, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Habergham, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Pilkington 1474 in Blackburn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Charles Pilkington 45 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gateford 40. Sie hat am 2. August 1490 in Whalley, Lancashire, England Sir John Towneley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Habergham, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Pilkington è nata il nel 1474 nel Blackburn, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Charles Pilkington, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gateford, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Towneley il 2 agosto 1490, nel Whalley, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel Habergham, Lancashire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kin: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブルンリー
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Pilkingtonが1474年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Charles Pilkingtonは45歳，母Elizabeth Gatefordは40歳であった。1490年8月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーでSir John Towneleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリスランカシュアイアハバーガムで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Pilkington(이)가 1474년 영국 랭카실르 블랙번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Charles Pilkington(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gateford(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1490년 8월 2일 영국 랭카실르 화알리에서 Sir John Towneley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 랭카실르 하버그함에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kin: Burnley, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Pilkington nasceu em 1474, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Charles Pilkington, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gateford, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Towneley em 2 de agosto de 1490, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Habergham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Pilkington родилась в 1474 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Charles Pilkington было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gateford, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Towneley 2 августа 1490 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности хабиргам, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Pilkington nació en 1474, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Charles Pilkington, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gateford, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir John Towneley el 2 de agosto de 1490, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1522, en Habergham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
